calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Douglas Antolin Rivas Argueta's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

payments.description: REQ OR STIP AND ORDER W/O HEARING
